name: nlp-automation
description: NLP-Automation - Personal Automation Command Executor Desktop App

scripts.start: npm run build:backend && npm run start:frontend
scripts.dev: npm run build:backend && npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.install:all: cd backend && go mod download && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.clean: cd backend && rm -f nlp-automation-backend && cd ../frontend && rm -rf dist node_modules/.cache

author: NLP-Automation Team
